title: meibomia subsessilis
intro: Meibomia subsessilis, also known as Butterfly Weed or Orange Milkweed, is a perennial plant species native to North America. It is known for its bright orange flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Meibomia subsessilis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain and swelling, and support the immune system. Meibomia subsessilis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and has been used in herbal remedies to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
